lines.speaker: Man
lines.content: Hi, you must be Sarah. I am Tom. Nice to meet you. I hope you did not wait too long.
lines.cn: 你好，你一定是莎拉。我是汤姆。很高兴认识你。希望你没等太久。

lines.speaker: Woman
lines.content: Hi Tom, nice to meet you too. I just arrived five minutes ago. This cafe looks cozy.
lines.cn: 你好汤姆，我也很高兴认识你。我刚到五分钟。这家咖啡馆看起来很温馨。

lines.speaker: Man
lines.content: Yes, I come here often. So, what do you do for work? My friend told me you are a teacher.
lines.cn: 是的，我经常来。那你做什么工作？我朋友告诉我你是老师。

lines.speaker: Woman
lines.content: That is right. I teach English at a high school. It is challenging but rewarding. How about you?
lines.cn: 没错。我在高中教英语。很有挑战性但也很 rewarding。你呢？

lines.speaker: Man
lines.content: I work as a software engineer at a tech company. I mostly work from home these days.
lines.cn: 我在一家科技公司做软件工程师。最近我 mostly 在家办公。

lines.speaker: Woman
lines.content: That sounds nice. What do you like to do in your free time? Any hobbies?
lines.cn: 听起来不错。你空闲时间喜欢做什么？有什么爱好？

lines.speaker: Man
lines.content: I enjoy hiking and photography. I also like trying new restaurants on weekends. What about you?
lines.cn: 我喜欢徒步和摄影。周末也喜欢尝试新餐厅。你呢？

lines.speaker: Woman
lines.content: I love reading and baking. I recently started learning how to play the guitar.
lines.cn: 我喜欢读书和烘焙。最近开始学弹吉他。

lines.speaker: Man
lines.content: That is great. I have been thinking about learning guitar too. Maybe we can practice together sometime.
lines.cn: 太好了。我也一直想学吉他。也许以后我们可以一起练习。

lines.speaker: Woman
lines.content: That would be fun. I would like that. Would you like to order some dessert?
lines.cn: 那会很开心。我很乐意。你要不要点些甜点？
